get.description: Return application health status.

post.description:
Create a new API key.

In bootstrap mode (no active keys exist), auth is skipped so the first
key can be created.  Otherwise standard auth is required.

get.description: List all API keys (paginated).

delete.description:
Revoke (deactivate) an API key.

The last active key cannot be revoked to prevent lockout.

get.description: List artifacts for a given evaluation with pagination.

parameters.name: evaluation_id

schema.description: Evaluation ID to list artifacts for
schema.title: Evaluation Id

parameters.description: Evaluation ID to list artifacts for

get.description: Get artifact metadata by ID.
Download an artifact file.
Preview an artifact's content inline (text/JSON only).

post.description:
Upload and analyze files for dataset import.

Accepts multipart file uploads. Detects format, extracts schema,
and suggests field mappings.
Import a dataset using a previously analyzed session and field mapping.

schema.title: Response Import Dataset Api V1 Datasets Import Post

delete.description: Delete an analysis session to free resources.

post.description: Create a new dataset with optional items.

get.description: List datasets with pagination and optional name filter.
Get a dataset by ID with all its items.

put.description: Update dataset metadata (does not modify items).

delete.description: Delete a dataset and all its items.

post.description: Create a new evaluation.

get.description: List evaluations with pagination and optional filters.

post.description:
Create an evaluation and run it, returning results in a single request.

When ``async=true``, launches the evaluation as a background task and
returns 202 with a poll URL.  Otherwise blocks until the evaluation
completes (or times out) and returns the full ``RunResponse``.

Content negotiation: if the ``Accept`` header is ``text/plain``, the
response body is ``{score}\n{VERDICT}`` for easy CLI/pipeline usage.

get.description: Get an evaluation by ID.

delete.description: Delete an evaluation and all its results.

post.description: Cancel a running evaluation.
Trigger an evaluation run as a background task.
Re-run a completed or failed evaluation, clearing old results.

get.description: List all registered evaluators, optionally filtered by mode.

schema.title: Response List Evaluators Api V1 Evaluators Get

get.description: Get a single evaluator by ID, including its config schema.

post.description: Upload a configuration file for an evaluator.

get.description: List uploaded config files for an evaluator.

schema.title: Response List Config Files Api V1 Evaluators  Evaluator Id  Config Files Get

get.description: Retrieve the content of a config file as plain text.
List sessions with optional filtering and pagination.

post.description: Create a new interactive session, optionally linked to an evaluation.

get.description: Get a session by ID.

post.description: Send a message in a session (REST fallback -- stores message, returns updated session).
End an active session.

Score a session with a judge configuration.

Transitions: ended/completed -> scoring -> completed (or ended on failure).
Creates or upserts a Result record linked to the session's evaluation.

get.description: Get session data formatted for replay.
Return JSON Schema for provider creation, including field descriptions.

schema.title: Response Get Provider Schema Api V1 Providers Schema Get

post.description:
Test connectivity to a provider endpoint without saving it.

For LiteLLM providers, fetches /v1/models from the API base.
For custom providers, sends a test request using the configured template.

get.description: List all providers.

schema.title: Response List Providers Api V1 Providers Get

parameters.description: ID of the evaluation to aggregate metrics for.

get.description:
Compare results across evaluations.

All evaluations must share the same mode and dataset_id. Returns per-evaluation
aggregate statistics and per-item aligned comparisons grouped by dataset_item_id.
Get arena leaderboard with ranked contestants for an evaluation.
Get a result by ID.

ImportRequest.title: ImportRequest
ImportRequest.description: Request body for the import endpoint.

name.title: Name
name.description: A descriptive name for this provider (e.g., 'RLS Staging', 'Local Llama').

default_model.title: Default Model
default_model.description: The default LLM model identifier (e.g., 'openai/gpt-4'). Optional — leave empty to select a model at runtime.

api_base.title: Api Base
api_base.description: Base URL for the LLM API endpoint (e.g., 'https://api.example.com/v1'). Required for self-hosted or custom endpoints.

api_key_env.title: Api Key Env
api_key_env.description: Name of the environment variable containing the API key (e.g., 'OPENAI_API_KEY'). The key value is read from the server environment at runtime.

proxy.title: Proxy
proxy.description: HTTP proxy URL for routing requests (e.g., 'http://squid.corp.example.com:3128'). Used in corporate environments with network restrictions.

ssl_cert_path.title: Ssl Cert Path
ssl_cert_path.description: Path to the SSL client certificate file for mTLS authentication, or a CA certificate bundle for server verification.

ssl_client_key.title: Ssl Client Key
ssl_client_key.description: Path to the SSL client private key file. When set alongside ssl_cert_path, enables mutual TLS (mTLS) authentication.

tags.title: Tags
tags.description: Tags for organizing and filtering providers (e.g., 'staging', 'production', 'local').

default_params.title: Default Params
default_params.description: Default LLM parameters applied to all calls (e.g., {"max_tokens": 2048, "temperature": 0.7}). Can be overridden per evaluation.

provider_type.title: Provider Type
provider_type.description: Provider type: 'litellm' for OpenAI-compatible APIs via LiteLLM, or 'custom' for any HTTP API with a custom request/response format.

endpoint_url.title: Endpoint Url
endpoint_url.description: Full URL for custom provider endpoints. Only used when provider_type is 'custom'.

request_body_template.title: Request Body Template
request_body_template.description: JSON template for the request body. Use {{message}} as a placeholder for the user's message. Example: {"question": "{{message}}"}

response_json_path.title: Response Json Path
response_json_path.description: Dot-path to extract the response text from the API JSON response (e.g., 'data.text', 'output.content', 'choices.0.message.content').

single_model.title: Single Model
single_model.description: Whether this provider serves a single model implicitly. When true, no model selection is needed — the endpoint itself is the model.

rate_limited.title: Rate Limited
rate_limited.description: Whether rate limiting is enabled for this provider.

rate_limits.title: Rate Limits
rate_limits.description: Rate limit rules for throttling requests to this provider. Example: [{"value": 10, "unit": "requests", "per": "minute"}]

ProviderModelResponse.description: A model available from a provider's OpenAI-compatible /v1/models endpoint.

value.title: Value

per.title: Per

RateLimit.title: RateLimit
